narrative:
Mansfield City has 25,869 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
